Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JESSE MANN'S Motion To Vacate Renewal Of Judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to vacate renewal of judgment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers.

A proposed order has been submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
